examples.title: Backpropagation Algorithm
examples.code:
FOR each layer in reverse order:
  FOR each node in layer:
    compute error signal
    update weights
  END FOR
END FOR
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the process of backpropagation, where error signals are propagated backwards through the network to update the weights.
